questionHtml: By deleting the vertex which represents Chicago, use the deleted vertex algorithm to determine a lower bound for the travelling salesman problem.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to find MST of L, N, D and S          (M1)

by deleting C, Kruskal gives MST for the remainder as LD, DN, LS weight 123          (A1)

(lower bound is therefore 123+(30+41)=)$194          A1

 

Note: Award (M1) for a graph or list of edges that does not include C.

Award (A1) if 26+39+58 seen in any order.

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: By deleting the vertex which represents Chicago, use the deleted vertex algorithm to determine a lower bound for the travelling salesman problem.
